step.name: buildApiNode
step.source:
import io.nop.core.lang.xml.XNode;
return XNode.parse('<api x:schema="/nop/schema/api.xdef" xmlns:x="/nop/schema/xdsl.xdef">' + '<services>' + '<service name="DemoService" className="app.demo.api.DemoService">' + '<method name="sayHello" requestMessage="app.demo.api.beans.DemoRequest" responseMessage="app.demo.api.beans.DemoResponse"/>' + '</service>' + '</services>' + '<messages>' + '<message name="DemoRequest" displayName="Demo Request">' + '<field propId="1" name="name" displayName="Name"><schema type="String"/></field>' + '</message>' + '<message name="DemoResponse" displayName="Demo Response">' + '<field propId="1" name="message" displayName="Message"><schema type="String"/></field>' + '</message>' + '</messages>' + '</api>');

step.name: collectProof
